name: Slack Demos
description: Click-through Slack prototype demos (React + Vite static app)

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Install devDependencies on Heroku so TypeScript and Vite can run the production build.

VITE_SHARE_BASE_URL.description: Optional. Public site URL for Share demo links (no trailing slash). Leave unset to use the browser origin (normal for Heroku).
